---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the problem or need.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain how this would help traders or administrators.

## Possible Scope

- UI change
- Backend change
- Analytics change
- Documentation change
- Other

## Additional Notes

Add examples, references, or screenshots if useful.
